q3: The locked elements — error message, buttons, that bottom line — it understood those and didn't touch them, which I appreciated. But that opening line on the recovery screen was a twenty-round battle, and the suggestions kept drifting into the same two failure modes: either too narrative and reassuring-sounding, or too blunt and checklist-y. I kept trying to describe the exact register I wanted and it never quite landed there on its own.
